title: Handsets
subtitle: Pair an external handset with BigFred

alerts.noServer: No command station on this layout has a handset server enabled. Ask an admin to turn one on under

fields.allowAllVehicles: All vehicles I am allowed to drive on this layout
fields.handsetBrakeSecsHint: After how long without handset communication with BigFred does emergency braking activate? ({{min}}s - {{max}}s)

status.keepaliveHint: After {{seconds}} seconds of the handset not communicating with BigFred, consists are braked

z21.instructions: Enter the code via function keys on the numeric keypad, or set CV3 and CV4 in programming mode on any locomotive. Values are not written to the real vehicle — pairing only.

withrottle.instructions:
Select the “Pair with BigFred” locomotive (address 3) from the loco list and press function keys F0–F9 for each digit (e.g. 1 2 2 1 4 5) to enter the pairing code on the temporary locomotive, or
• Set your device name to the six-digit code without spaces.
